# Boreal Labs Web – AI Guide

- **Stack/layout**: Vite + React 18 + Tailwind (shadcn-style components) with alias `@`→`src` in [vite.config.js](vite.config.js); entry [src/main.jsx](src/main.jsx) renders [src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx) which wraps `BrowserRouter`, `HelmetProvider`, `RecaptchaContext`, `Toaster`, `Navbar`/`Footer`, and Spanish-first routes (`/`, `/nosotros`, `/equipo`, `/eventos`, `/validacion|/validar-certificado`, `/admin`, `/admin/layout`).
- **Styling/UI**: Tailwind tokens in [tailwind.config.js](tailwind.config.js) (boreal-* palette, Montserrat font, dark mode by class). Reusable UI primitives live in [src/components/ui](src/components/ui) with `cn` helper in [src/lib/utils.js](src/lib/utils.js). Animations via `framer-motion`; icons via `lucide-react`; helmet tags set per page.
- **Firebase client**: [src/firebase.jsx](src/firebase.jsx) initializes Firestore/Auth/Storage/Analytics with hardcoded config, enables Firestore debug logs, and auto-signs in anonymously (non-fatal if disabled). Prefer moving keys to `.env` (`VITE_…`) for production.
- **Environment variables (web)**: `VITE_RECAPTCHA_SITE_KEY` for reCAPTCHA v2; `VITE_ADMIN_EMAILS` (comma list) gates admin access in [src/components/AdminGate.jsx](src/components/AdminGate.jsx) using Firebase email/password auth + allowlist + `browserLocalPersistence`.
- **Config data**: [src/lib/configService.js](src/lib/configService.js) reads `siteConfig/links` doc (Firestore) with defaults and live subscription. `normalizeYouTubeUrl` converts YouTube URLs to `embed` format for Home video.
- **Events flow**: [src/pages/EventsPage.jsx](src/pages/EventsPage.jsx) pulls `events` collection (ordered by `date`), resolves images from `image`/`imageUrl` (string|array|object with `ref` or `downloadURL`), and counts registrations via `registrations` collection. Registrations add docs `{eventId,eventName,userName,userEmail,userWhatsapp,university,country,department,isCommunityMember:boolean,tipoAsistencia,recaptchaTokenV2,registrationDate}` after reCAPTCHA v2 passes; confirmation message can come from multiple event fields (`mensajeConfirmacion|confirmMessage|mensajeExtra|nota`). Keep v2 captcha intact; v3 is intentionally removed.
- **Admin flow**: [src/pages/AdminPanel.jsx](src/pages/AdminPanel.jsx) is behind `AdminGate`, fetches `registrations`, groups by event, toggles `statusAsistencia`, bulk deletes, and can add manual entries (roles: participante/ponente/staff). It invokes Cloud Function `generateCertificates` via `httpsCallable` and shows results modal. Logout is handled via Firebase auth.
- **Certificate layout tooling**: [src/pages/LayoutEditor.jsx](src/pages/LayoutEditor.jsx) (at `/admin/layout`) is a visual editor for `layout.json` used by the Cloud Function. It exports JSON, or uploads to Storage path `cert-templates/layout.json`; defaults mirror [functions/layout.json](functions/layout.json). Supports background image and draggable/snap rectangles for fields.
- **Validation page**: [src/pages/PaginaValidacion.jsx](src/pages/PaginaValidacion.jsx) reads `?id=` param, queries `certificados` where `idValidacion` matches, and renders certificate details; shows friendly error when missing/invalid.
- **Cloud Functions**: [functions/index.js](functions/index.js) exposes `generateCertificates` (onCall, `us-central1`). Requires authenticated caller; processes `registrations` with `statusAsistencia` truthy, dedupes by `email|role`, infers event date from `events` doc, builds PDFs via pdf-lib. Template selection from Storage `cert-templates/base.pdf|base-virtual.pdf|base-ponente.pdf|base-staff.pdf`; layout from `cert-templates/layout.json` (falls back to defaults). Stores PDFs under `certificates/<event>/id.pdf` with tokenized download URL and writes `certificados` docs `{correoUsuario,fechaEmision,idValidacion,modalidad,tipo,nombreEvento,nombreUsuario,urlPdf}`. Uses `process.env.VALIDATION_URL_BASE` (default `https://borealabs.org/validacion?id=`) to embed QR/links.
- **SEO/content**: Home/About/Team/Events pages set titles/descriptions via `Helmet`. Many images are hotlinked; some refer to `src/images/...` local assets.
- **Build/run**: `npm install`; `npm run dev -- --host :: --port 3000`; `npm run build` (runs optional `tools/generate-llms.js` then `vite build`); `npm run preview`. VS Code task “Build Vite project” maps to `npm run build`.
- **Testing/lint**: No test suite; ESLint present but no script. Keep code lint-friendly and avoid introducing non-ASCII unless required.
- **Routing nuances**: English paths redirect to Spanish (`/about→/nosotros`, `/team→/equipo`, `/events→/eventos`). Footer hides on `/admin*` and validation routes for mobile; `ScrollToTop` enforces top on navigation.
- **Patterns to preserve**: ReCAPTCHA v2 gating on registrations; resilient Firestore access with defaults; accepting flexible schema for events/images/attendance; avoid breaking alias `@`; maintain helmet font preload links (Montserrat) in [src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx).
